metadata.description: Multi-AI team collaboration: Multiple AIs (Codex, Gemini, Claude) work together as specialists. Use /unitor:collab when task needs multiple domains (e.g., 'build auth system', 'create data pipeline with API'). Use /unitor:route for single-domain tasks.

plugins.name: unitor
plugins.description: Orchestrates multiple AIs as a collaborative team. AIs discuss requirements, negotiate interfaces, and implement together. Use /unitor:collab for complex multi-domain tasks, /unitor:route for focused single-domain work. Supports any language and framework.
